title: gomphrena perennis subsp. genuina
intro: Gomphrena perennis subsp. genuina, also known as the perennial gomphrena, is a plant species within the Amaranthaceae family, characterized by its small, delicate flowers and medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Gomphrena perennis subsp. genuina include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
